overview: A Civil War veteran spends years searching for his abducted niece.
title: The Searchers

overview: A sheriff and his deputies defend a jailed prisoner against a powerful rancher.
title: Rio Bravo

overview: Strangers share a perilous stagecoach ride through Apache country.
title: Stagecoach

overview: Seven gunfighters hire on to defend a Mexican village from bandits.
title: The Magnificent Seven

overview: A general takes command of a battered B-17 bomb group in wartime England.
title: Twelve O'Clock High

overview: A Navy jet pilot is recalled to fly a dangerous strike during the Korean War.
title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri

overview: A dramatization of the events leading to the attack on Pearl Harbor.
title: Tora! Tora! Tora!

overview: Allied POWs plan a mass breakout from a German prison camp.
title: The Great Escape

overview: A tough U.S. Marshal helps a young girl track her father's killer.
title: True Grit

overview: A weary gunfighter tries to settle down with a homesteading family.
title: Shane

overview: A bounty hunter and a stranger uneasily join forces to track a wanted outlaw.
title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly

overview: An aging outlaw gang seeks one last score along the Texas border in 1913.
title: The Wild Bunch

overview: A railroad tycoon's hired guns close in on a mysterious harmonica-playing stranger.
title: Once Upon a Time in the West

overview: A Marine company battles ashore through the brutal Pacific island campaign.
title: Sands of Iwo Jima

overview: Allied prisoners are forced to build a strategic railway bridge in Burma.
title: The Bridge on the River Kwai

overview: Allied forces mount the largest amphibious invasion in history on the Normandy coast.
title: The Longest Day

overview: A commando team is sent to destroy two massive German guns on a Greek island.
title: The Guns of Navarone

overview: A small-town marshal awaits a noon showdown with a freed killer and his gang.
title: High Noon

overview: A lawyer's reputation rests on a frontier killing he did not truly commit.
title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance

overview: A reluctant officer leads a doomed squad through the Italian campaign of 1944.
title: A Walk in the Sun
